title: 3x3 Super Tools
description: Get your self some special tools that can mine in a 3x3 area, to make your life easier
body:
# ⚒️ Super Tools

**Super Tools** is a premium quality-of-life mod designed to elevate the Minecraft survival experience. 

This update marks a significant evolution: **3×3 mining** is no longer the sole focus. We have expanded your toolkit with innovative mechanics and powerful enchantments, ensuring that your tools do more than just dig—they work smarter.

---

### 🚀 Key Features

* **Efficient 3×3 Mining:** Clear large areas and tunnels instantly. A core feature, now refined for better performance.
* **Survival-Balanced:** Designed to eliminate the "grind" without skipping the "game." We save you time on repetitive tasks while keeping progression and challenge intact.
* **Unmatched Durability:** Introducing **Crying Obsidian** tools. Built to endure the toughest projects, allowing you to focus on building your world instead of repairing your gear.
* **Enhanced Exploration:** Discover hidden treasures and navigate the underground faster than ever before.
* **Fair Play Policy:** Purely QoL. No X-ray, auto-mining, aim assist, or unfair PvP advantages.

---

### ✨ Custom Enchantments

Expand your capabilities with unique enchantments tailored for efficiency.

| Enchantment | Effect | Compatible Tools | How to Obtain |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Magnetism** | Items go directly to your inventory. Pickaxes attract drops in a 6×6 area. | Pickaxe, Shovel, Axe, Hoe | Enchanting Table, Loot |
| **Replant** | Automatically replants seeds/saplings when harvesting (if present in inventory). | Hoe (Crops), Axe (Trees) | Enchanting Table, Loot |
| **Marine Fortune** | Increases drops from kelp, seagrass, and corals. | Shears | Enchanting Table, Loot |
| **Natural Silk** | Harvests plants and leaves intact instead of breaking them. | Shears, Hoe | Enchanting Table, Loot |
| **Instant Harvest** | Instantly harvests all mature crops in a wide area. | Hoe | Enchanting Table, Loot |
| **Vegetation Cleaner** | Rapidly clears grass, flowers, and marine vegetation in an area. | Shears | Enchanting Table, Loot |

---

### 🔧 Maintenance & Repair

Keep your legendary tools in top shape with these methods:

1.  **Anvil Restoration:** Combine your Super Tools with **Crying Obsidian blocks** in an anvil to restore durability.
2.  **Mending Compatibility:** Fully compatible with the vanilla **Mending** enchantment for XP-based repairs.

---

### 🛠️ The Future of Super Tools
We are constantly developing new mechanics to help you **skip the grind, not the game.** Stay tuned for upcoming features that will further streamline your survival journey!
